cartography.def: 製圖學、地圖製作術、製圖的人的工作的人物 (單數)
cartography.ex: Historical cartography provides insights into how early maps were made.

carton.def: 紙盒、紙箱、(美、法)靶心的人物 (單數)
carton.ex: He recycled the empty juice carton after breakfast.

cartoon.def: 漫畫、動畫片、初稿、製作漫畫的人物、製作地 (漫)
cartoon.ex: Watching morning cartoons is a favorite weekend activity.

cartouche.def: (建築)飾環、(埃及)橢圓形飾框的人物 (單數)
cartouche.ex: The temple cartouche contained the name of the great Pharaoh.

cartridge.def: 彈藥、筆芯、墨水匣的人物 (單數)
cartridge.ex: The printer is low on ink; I need to replace the cartridge.

cartwheel.def: 車輪、側手翻、做側手翻的人物、側翻地 (側)
cartwheel.ex: She practiced until she could do a perfect cartwheel.

carve.def: 雕刻、切開、開創、切的人人物、雕刻地 (雕)
carve.col: carve out a niche, carve the turkey
carve.ex: The artist used a sharp tool to carve a bird from wood.

carvel.def: 平接(船)、船身建造方式的人物 (單數)
carvel.ex: The historic ship was famous for being carvel built.

carven.def: 雕刻的 (古語)、刻上的人的人 (或物)
carven.ex: The carven stone altar was over five hundred years old.

carver.def: 雕刻家、切割刀、切割的人 (單數)
carver.ex: The master carver finished the intricate statue yesterday.

carvery.ex: We booked a table at the local Sunday carvery for lunch.

carving.def: 雕刻品、切肉的人 (或物) (雕)
carving.ex: He collects exquisite wood carvings from around the world.

caryatid.ex: The roof of the porch was supported by a classical caryatid.

cascade.def: 小瀑布、階梯狀噴泉、連續傳遞、如瀑布般落下的人的人物、落下地 (瀑)
cascade.col: cascade of water, cascade of events (一連串事件)
cascade.ex: The stream fell in a beautiful cascade down the mountain rocks.

cascading.def: 階層式的、如瀑布般的的人 (或物) (瀑)
cascading.ex: The garden wall was covered with cascading flowers.

cascara.def: 藥鼠李(皮)、潟藥的人 (或物) (藥)
cascara.ex: Cascara was traditionally used as a natural, bitter laxative.

case.def: 案件、病例、容器、事實、包裝、包裝的人的人物、包裝地 (案)
case.col: court case, brief case, showcase, in case of (萬一), just in case
case.ex: The police are still investigating the murder case.

casebook.ex: This famous mystery is from a legendary detective's casebook.

cased.def: 封裝的、裝箱的人的人 (或物)
cased.ex: The artifacts were displayed in secure, glass-cased units.

caseharden.def: 使表面硬化、使無情的人的人物、硬化地 (硬)
caseharden.ex: The factory uses a special process to caseharden the steel parts.

case-history/casehistory.def: 病歷、案件歷史的人物 (單數)
case-history/casehistory.ex: The doctor carefully reviewed the patient's long case-history.

casein.ex: Casein is one of the main proteins found in cow's milk.

caseload.def: 案件量、(律、醫)辦案數量的人物 (單數)
caseload.ex: The social worker found it hard to manage her heavy caseload.
